title: Fix /api/about metadata — update version and phase strings
description:
Update `WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs` `/api/about` endpoint: set `Version = "0.46.0"` and `Phase = "Sprint 46 — Observability + Safety"`. Currently reports "0.37.0" and "Sprint 36". Add a test that asserts the values match the roadmap. Stretch goal: centralize version in Directory.Build.props or a shared constants file.

Evidence: deep-dive audit Finding #4 — runtime metadata is stale and undermines operator trust.

**Note:** Auto-generated key TSK-0100 conflicts with existing Sprint 46 Wave A task. Correct key is **TSK-0109**.
